ORDER BY t.typname, e.enumsortorder;

SEEDSQL)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d local_brands_db -c "
SELECT 'Users' as entity, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM \\"user\\"
UNION ALL SELECT 'Brands', COUNT\(*\) FROM brand
UNION ALL SELECT 'Brand-User Links', COUNT\(*\) FROM brand_users
UNION ALL SELECT 'Products', COUNT\(*\) FROM product
UNION ALL SELECT 'Product Variants', COUNT\(*\) FROM product_variant
ORDER BY entity;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres -d local_brands_db -c "
SELECT b.name as brand, COUNT\(p.id\) as products
FROM brand b
LEFT JOIN product p ON p.\\"brandId\\" = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.name
ORDER BY b.id;
" 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''total: {d.get\(""total"",d.get\(""totalItems"",""?""\)\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  id={p[""id""]} name={p[""name""]} status={p[""status""]}''''\) for p in d[''''items'''']]")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d local_brands_db -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM product_embedding WHERE embedding IS NOT NULL;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d local_brands_db -c "SELECT \\"productId\\", \\"imageUrl\\" FROM product_embedding LIMIT 3;" 2>&1)
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h localhost -U postgres -d local_brands_db -c "DELETE FROM product_embedding WHERE embedding IS NULL;" 2>&1)
